title: OpenPose V6 three-seed full-body walking local robustness
known_issues: One of three samples changed the requested white sneakers to black sneakers.
OpenPose body topology ends at ankle landmarks; detailed foot/toe keypoint control remains unproven.
Visible hands are coherent at whole-image scale, but detailed finger geometry authority is not established.
The matrix is local-only and does not prove target-runtime behavior or final lane certification.
